title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Home Screen earbud images and battery indicators do not update correctly when disconnecting/reconnecting individual earbuds on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds (Left and Right) of the Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Voyager Free 20) are connected and appear on the Home screen with battery indicators visible and status showing "Connected".
3. Disconnect the Left earbud only (e.g., place it in the charging case and close the lid, or turn it off via the device).
4. Observe the Home screen for the Left earbud image, battery indicator, and overall connection status.
5. Reconnect the Left earbud (remove from case or power on) and wait for it to connect.
6. Observe the Home screen again for the Left earbud image, battery indicator, and overall connection status.
7. Disconnect the Right earbud only (e.g., place it in the charging case and close the lid, or turn it off via the device).
8. Observe the Home screen for the Right earbud image, battery indicator, and overall connection status.
9. Reconnect the Right earbud (remove from case or power on) and wait for it to connect.
10. Observe the Home screen again for the Right earbud image, battery indicator, and overall connection status.
11. Disconnect both earbuds simultaneously (e.g., place both in the charging case and close the lid).
12. Observe the Home screen for both earbud images, battery indicators, and overall connection status.
13. Reconnect both earbuds simultaneously (remove both from case) and wait for them to connect.
14. Observe the Home screen for both earbud images, battery indicators, and overall connection status.
expected: The Home screen correctly updates for each scenario: disconnected earbuds show a greyed-out image and battery indicator, connected earbuds show a full-color image and live battery percentage. The overall connection status accurately reflects "Connected" when at least one earbud is connected, and "Disconnected" when both are disconnected.
